prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ONLY_DWT_rf', seasonality_champion='ARIMA', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Validation folds show significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.33) and high seasonality variance (0.73), indicating models capture patterns very differently. ARIMA dominates overall RMSE while ONLY_DWT_rf best tracks trends, with early/late horizon specialists showing some divergence. DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model behaviors without overfitting to any single pattern.

raw.pattern_analyst:
{
  "trend_champion": "ONLY_DWT_rf",
  "seasonality_champion": "ARIMA",
  "overall_champion": "ARIMA",
  "horizon_specialists": {"early": "ARIMA", "late": "rf"},
  "tier1_models": ["ARIMA", "NaiveMovingAverage", "ETS", "DWT_catboost", "FT_rf", "FT_catboost", "catboost", "rf"],
  "tier2_models": ["DWT_svr", "ONLY_DWT_svr", "svr", "FT_svr", "ONLY_CWT_svr", "ONLY_DWT_rf", "CWT_rf", "ONLY_DWT_catboost"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",
  "key_insights": {
    "rmse_spread_ratio": 0.3343,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["down", "up", "up"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "Validation folds show significant model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=0.33) and high seasonality variance (0.73), indicating models capture patterns very differently. ARIMA dominates overall RMSE while ONLY_DWT_rf best tracks trends, with early/late horizon specialists showing some divergence. DBA combination is recommended to leverage diverse model behaviors without overfitting to any single pattern."
}
raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k3", "inverse_rmse_weights_k3_sh0.35"],
  "params_overrides": {},
  "score_preset": "balanced",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=8 indicates strong model diversity across horizons, favoring selection methods over simple mean. relative_spread_mean=0.167 shows moderate disagreement (below 0.25 threshold) but still warrants DBA for phase-shift robustness. n_windows=3 is low, so top_k=3 with shrinkage=0.35 prevents overfitting. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination explicitly for high seasonality_variance=0.73 and model disagreement scenarios. ARIMA (RMSE=95.72) dominates overall while ONLY_DWT_rf captures trends best—DBA leverages both without bias."
}
